summary: Backend-only smoke test for A.L.E.X. Financial Cockpit. All 11 endpoints exercised via public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Settings GET/PUT, monthly-entries CRUD + upsert-by-mese, dashboard cumulative math, FSI weighting, PAC sustainability, fondo_emergenza, debt-plan projection, watchlist add/list/delete, and Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI analyze all functioning correctly.
passed: PUT /api/settings persists all fields including entrate/spese/saldi/debito_zio (200)
POST /api/monthly-entries with same mese upserts existing (verified id preserved, fields overwritten)
GET /api/monthly-entries returns entries sorted by mese ascending
GET /api/dashboard returns last, history, fsi (with sub liquidita/debito/risparmio/buffer), pac_sustainability, fondo_emergenza (attuale/target/copertura_mesi/gap/mesi_target), debito, allocation
PAC sustainability verified: pct=20% (700/3500), residua=1000 (3500-1800-700), giudizio='Sostenibile'
GET /api/debt-plan: residuo=10700, mesi_rimanenti=22, data_estinzione=2027-11, piano starts 2026-02 (month after last entry)
POST /api/ai/analyze (Claude Sonnet 4.5) returned valid JSON with all 15 required keys in ~24s (decisione=HOLD, score=78)
notes: test_credentials.md not required (no auth in app). Frontend testing intentionally skipped per review_request testing_type='backend only'.
